title: Revolve Group (RVLV) Beats Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Revolve Group (RVLV) beat both earnings and revenue estimates in Q2 2024. The company reported diluted earnings per share of $0.21, significantly exceeding the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.12, representing a 75% earnings surprise. Net sales reached $282.46 million, surpassing the estimate by 1.99% and representing 3.2% year-over-year growth from $273.73 million. The strong earnings surprise reflected operational leverage and improved profitability despite modest revenue growth. The company continued to demonstrate cost discipline with improved gross margins and controlled operating expenses. Active customers remained stable with strong engagement metrics. Management reaffirmed confidence in the business and continued execution of strategic initiatives including product category expansion, digital merchandising improvements, and international growth. For the full year 2024, the company maintained expectations for continued gross margin expansion and disciplined expense management. The Q2 results continued the company's pattern of beating earnings estimates while navigating a challenging retail environment.
